zh.lifeSummary: 當James I Stewart King of Scotland於1394年7月25日出生在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林時，他的父親Robert III Stewart King of Scotland56歲，母親Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland43歲。他於1424年2月2日與Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland在英國素瑞素瓦可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1437年登記服兵役。他於1435年被列為master of the king's household - james i of scotland。他去世於1437年2月21日在美國密西西比州玻利瓦爾培爾享年42歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾培斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James I Stewart King of Scotland于1394年7月25日出生在苏格兰費伏登福姆林时，他的父亲Robert III Stewart King of Scotland56岁，母亲Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland43岁。他于1424年2月2日与Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland在英国素瑞素瓦可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1437年登记服兵役。他于1435年被列为master of the king's household - james i of scotland。他去世于1437年2月21日在美国密西西比州玻利瓦爾培爾享年42岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾培斯。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James I Stewart King of Scotland was born on 25 July 1394, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, his father, Robert III Stewart King of Scotland, was 56 and his mother, Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, was 43. He married Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland on 2 February 1424, in Southwark, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He registered for military service in 1437. In 1435, his occupation is listed as master of the king's household - james i of scotland. He died on 21 February 1437, in Perthshire, Bolivar, Mississippi, United States, at the age of 42, and was buried in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James I Stewart King of Scotland est né le 25 juillet 1394, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, son père, Robert III Stewart King of Scotland, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland le 2 février 1424, à Southwark, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1437. En 1435, sa profession de son indiquée est master of the king's household - james i of scotland. Il est décédé le 21 février 1437, à Perthshire, Bolivar, Mississippi, États-Unis, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als James I Stewart King of Scotland am 25. Juli 1394 in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert III Stewart King of Scotland 56 und seine Mutter Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland 43. Er hat am 2. Februar 1424 in Southwark, Surrey, England Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er hat sich 1437 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1435 ist sein Beruf als master of the king's household - james i of scotland aufgeführt. Er starb am 21. Februar 1437 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Perthshire, Bolivar, Mississippi, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James I Stewart King of Scotland è nato il il 25 luglio 1394 nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, il suo padre, Robert III Stewart King of Scotland, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland il 2 febbraio 1424, nel Southwark, Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1437. Nel 1435, la sua occupazione è indicata come master of the king's household - james i of scotland. Morì il 21 febbraio 1437, nel Perthshire, Bolivar, Mississippi, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Perth, Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: James I Stewart King of Scotlandが1394年7月25日にスコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインで生まれた時，父Robert III Stewart King of Scotlandは56歳，母Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotlandは43歳であった。1424年2月2日にイギリススリーソウスワークでJoan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1437年に兵役登録をした。1435年，職業はmaster of the king's household - james i of scotlandと記録されている。彼は1437年2月21日にアメリカ合衆国ミシシッピ州ボリバーペルスシュアイアで42歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James I Stewart King of Scotland(이)가 1394년 7월 25일 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert III Stewart King of Scotland(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1424년 2월 2일 영국 수리 소우스워크에서 Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1437년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1435년, 그의 직업은 master of the king's household - james i of scotland이었다. 그는 1437년 2월 21일 미국 미시시피 주 볼리바르 퍼스실르에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에 묻혔다.

pt.Church of the Friar Preachers of the Ble: Perthshire, Bolivar, Mississípi, Estados Unidos da América
pt.lifeSummary: Quando James I Stewart King of Scotland nasceu em 25 de julho de 1394, em Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Robert III Stewart King of Scotland, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland em 2 de fevereiro de 1424, em Southwark, Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1437. Em 1435, sua profissão aparece como master of the king's household - james i of scotland. Ele faleceu em 21 de fevereiro de 1437, em Perthshire, Bolivar, Mississípi, Estados Unidos da América, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James I Stewart King of Scotland родился 25 июля 1394 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert III Stewart King of Scotland было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland 2 февраля 1424 г. в местности соутварк, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1437 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1435 годуработал по профессии master of the king's household - james i of scotland. Он умер 21 февраля 1437 г. в местности пиртшир, боливар, Миссисипи, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия.

es.25 July 1394–21 February 1437: 25 de julio de 1394–21 de febrero de 1437
es.lifeSummary: Cuando James I Stewart King of Scotland nació el 25 de julio de 1394, en Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, su papá, Robert III Stewart King of Scotland, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland el 2 de febrero de 1424, en Southwark, Surrey, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1437. En 1435, su ocupación registrada era master of the king's household - james i of scotland. Murió el 21 de febrero de 1437, en Perthshire, Bolivar, Misisipi, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland.
